item.title: The History - Book 8 (Urania) by Herodotus
item.description: Author: Herodotus Summary (Slides by nblm) Newsletter Post www.readgreatbooks.info/p/great-books-ep-117-herodotus-the Notes The Allies (Athenian Coalition): 271 ships - Athens:127 ships, Corinth: 40, Megara: 20, Aegina: 18, Sparta: 10.

item.title: Luminous Infinitus
item.description: Hi there! I’m Rob. I also go by Robin or Robinson. Welcome to my personal website.
